{{Quote|That's a heavy!|[[Shriv Suurgav]]|<ref name="Battlefront II" />}}
'''Heavy Weapons Stormtroopers''', also called '''Heavy Stormtroopers''', '''Heavy Assault Troopers''', '''Imperial Heavy Gunners''', or just simply '''Heavies''' were specially trained [[stormtrooper]]s armed with large [[Z-6 rotary blaster cannon|rapid-fire blasters]] or [[DLT-19 heavy blaster rifle]]s, which could level anything in their path. During the [[Galactic Civil War]], they were deployed to the battles of [[Battle of Endor|Endor]], [[Battle of Theed|Theed]], and [[Battle of Jakku|Jakku]].

==Description==
[[File:SWC_HeavyStromtrooper.png|thumb|left|200px|A Heavy Stormtrooper, wearing alternate armor]]
Heavy Weapons Stormtroopers, also known as Heavy Stormtroopers<ref name="Commander" /> or Imperial Heavy Gunners,<ref name="Force Arena">''[[Star Wars: Force Arena]]''</ref> were [[stormtrooper]]s of the [[Galactic Empire]]'s [[Stormtrooper Corps]]. The [[trooper]]s were trained in the use of heavy weapons, such as the [[Z-6 rotary blaster cannon]]<ref name="Commander" /> or the [[DLT-19 heavy blaster rifle]]. Some could be seen using [[MPL-57]] [[grenade launcher]]s, [[TL-50 Heavy Repeater]]s, or the [[T-21 light repeating blaster]]s. They could wear standard [[stormtrooper armor]], modified with the addition of a [[Color|black]] [[pauldron]], an [[IM-40 three-slot ammunition and tool pouch]], and a [[backpack]].<ref name="Battlefront II" /> Alternatively, they could also wear a more unique outfit, one still similar to the standard stormtrooper [[armor]] but with black shoulder pads, gauntlets, shin protectors and [[boot]]s.<ref name="Commander" />

Heavy Weapons Stormtroopers were often seen on the front lines of conflict<ref name="JFO" /> but were also sometimes seen as guards for Imperial installations.<ref name="Recon Missions" /> They were primarily trained to defend combat zones as support squads to regular stormtroopers. Although their heavy weapons were highly effective, they required a cool-down period after use, leaving them vulnerable.<ref name="JFO" /> Heavy Weapons Stormtrooper variants included the [[Heavy Sandtrooper]], the [[Heavy Shoretrooper]], and the [[Heavy Snowtrooper]], who were utilized in more specialist environments.<ref name="Commander" />

==History==
{{Quote|Watch out! Enemy heavy!|Shriv Suurgav|<ref name="Battlefront II" />}}
[[File:Heavy_Stormtrooper.jpg|thumb|right|180px|A Heavy Weapons Stormtrooper defending an Imperial installation during the Spectres' rebellion.]]
Five years into the [[Great Jedi Purge]], Imperial Heavy Weapons Stormtroopers were stationed on [[Zeffo]], the [[Imperial Refinery]] on [[Kashyyyk]], [[Ilum]] and the [[Fortress Inquisitorius]] on [[Nur]], where they encountered and were defeated by the [[Jedi]] [[Padawan]] [[Cal Kestis]].<ref name="JFO" /> Members of the [[Spectres]] fought Heavy Weapons Stormtroopers during their rebellion against the Empire.<ref name="Recon Missions" />

In the [[Galactic Civil War]], Imperial Heavy Weapons Stormtroopers fought at the [[Battle of Endor]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] on the [[moon]] of [[Endor]], alongside the [[Imperial Special Forces|elite]] [[Inferno Squad]]. They laid siege to the [[Theed Royal Palace]] on [[Naboo]], and also defended the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer|Imperial Star Destroyer]] ''[[Eviscerator]]'' from [[New Republic]] forces at the [[Battle of Jakku]].<ref name="Battlefront II" />

==Behind the scenes==
Heavy Weapons Stormtroopers first appeared in the new ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the mobile [[Star Wars video games|game]] ''[[Star Wars: Commander]]''.<ref name="Commander" />
